title: Alive Textures
description: A minimal texture pack that tweaks the GUI and building blocks.
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/qHFLQkm.png) Alive Textures is a resource pack tweaking multiple things. Such as the GUI, building blocks, models, and more. ## Main Features - Smoother planks - Rounded log tops and beehive tops - Smoother andesite, diorite, and granite (including polished varients) - Darker, more minimal GUI - Smoother hearts and bread hunger icons - Smaller crosshair, lower shield and totem in offhand ## Screenshots ![](https://i.imgur.com/jCJclOW.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/3IfxW41.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/KtLtAFi.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/jpRztfB.png) ## Alive Alive is a part of DuckyHQ. See my other projects at my website. Join my Discord to report bugs, request features, and hang out with the community. Also check out my Modpack! [![Discord Link](https://i.imgur.com/T47lwtj.png)](https://discord.gg/kVS5dEekmT) [![Website Link](https://i.imgur.com/VLVP0L0.png)](https://www.duckyhq.com) [![Alive Mods](https://i.imgur.com/HLAZnmb.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/alive-mods) ## Credits
Click to view Bread hunger bar from: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/nan2uu-bread-hunger/
Higher resolution banner shield textures from: https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
